touches.ai_summary: Inbound request received from Fatima Klein expressing interest in call recording and coaching capabilities for their sales team. Initial inquiry mentions they're currently evaluating options including Fathom.

Initial qualification call with Fatima to understand GoldenMarket's current sales coaching process and pain points. Team of 14 reps struggling with inconsistent coaching. Fatima confirmed she's the Director of Sales and primary decision-maker for tool evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for coaching your sales team?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual review of select calls, very time-consuming and inconsistent

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive and offer additional consulting services they don't provide

next_steps: Schedule follow-up to discuss technical requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call to dive deeper into team structure and use cases. Discussed integration requirements with their current tech stack. Fatima mentioned Ruby Singh (COO) would need to approve any new tooling.

questions_asked.question: Who else will be involved in the evaluation process?
questions_asked.answer: Ruby Singh our COO will need to sign off, and IT will need to review security

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks depending on integrations

next_steps: Prepare technical documentation for IT review

touches.ai_summary: Sent follow-up email with case study from similar EdTech company and technical documentation. Fatima responded confirming she shared materials with Ruby and scheduled discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Can you share examples of ROI from similar customers?
questions_asked.answer: Included case study showing 40% reduction in ramp time

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Brief call to confirm discovery agenda and attendees. Fatima mentioned Michael Richter from IT would join the discovery call to assess security and integration requirements.

questions_asked.question: What are your top priorities for the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Understanding the coaching workflows and making sure IT is comfortable with security

next_steps: Conduct discovery call with expanded team

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Fatima covering detailed workflow requirements, coaching cadence, and success metrics. Discussed their current evaluation of Fathom and key differentiators. Fatima emphasized need for more hands-on consulting support which Fathom doesn't offer.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency for a solution now?
questions_asked.answer: Q2 sales performance below target, need to accelerate rep development

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support is included in your packages?
questions_asked.answer: Our Automations Plus Consulting tier includes dedicated coaching sessions and best practice workshops

questions_asked.question: How are you currently measuring coaching effectiveness?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly anecdotal, want data-driven approach

objections: Fathom pricing is lower for basic recording features
next_steps: Send detailed feature comparison vs Fathom
Loop in Amanda from RevOps for metrics discussion

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call to address questions from discovery and prepare for demo. Discussed specific coaching scenarios and custom workflow requirements. Fatima confirmed Ruby is supportive but focused on ROI justification.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the coaching scorecards?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable based on your methodology

questions_asked.question: What would success look like in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: All reps using it consistently, seeing measurable improvement in talk-to-listen ratios

touches.ai_summary: Brief sync to confirm demo attendees and agenda. Fatima mentioned Ruby might join the demo if timing works. Confirmed focus areas for the demo session.

questions_asked.question: Any specific scenarios you want to see in the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Objection handling analysis and coaching workflow automation

next_steps: Demo scheduled with Fatima, potentially Ruby

touches.ai_summary: Product demo showcasing call recording, AI coaching insights, and automated workflows. Fatima engaged throughout, particularly interested in custom scorecards and consulting services. Discussed pricing tiers and fit for 14 seats. Compared automation capabilities vs Fathom's more basic offering.

questions_asked.question: How much time does setup typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: About 2 weeks with our consulting support included

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing structure for the consulting tier?
questions_asked.answer: Reviewed automations_plus_consulting package pricing

questions_asked.question: How important is the consulting component vs just the software?
questions_asked.answer: Very important, we need help defining our coaching methodology

questions_asked.question: Can we start with fewer seats and expand?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, though per-seat pricing is better at 14+ seats

objections: Price point higher than Fathom, need to justify to Ruby

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after demo with proposal for 14 seats on automations_plus_consulting tier. Included ROI calculator and implementation timeline. Fatima acknowledged receipt and said she's reviewing with Ruby.
next_steps: Wait for feedback from Ruby review

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email on proposal status. Fatima responded that Ruby has questions about pricing and wants to understand the value gap vs Fathom's lower-cost option.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide more detail on what the consulting includes vs Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: Sent breakdown of quarterly coaching sessions, custom playbook development, and ongoing optimization

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Ruby Singh to discuss business case and ROI. Ruby focused on cost-benefit analysis and competitive positioning vs Fathom. Positive on the coaching consulting value-add but wants to ensure pricing is defensible to finance. Asked about flexibility on pricing.

questions_asked.question: What makes your consulting worth the premium over Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: Explained proprietary coaching methodology and dedicated CSM support

questions_asked.question: Do you have customer references in EdTech?
questions_asked.answer: Provided two EdTech references with similar team sizes

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Want to decide by end of quarter, implement in Q2

objections: Need to see more competitive pricing to justify vs Fathom
next_steps: Connect Ruby with EdTech reference customer

touches.ai_summary: Email to Fatima following Ruby meeting, offering to connect on pricing discussion. Fatima confirmed Ruby is supportive of the solution but procurement (Michael and Amanda) will push on price.
Follow-up email sharing EdTech customer reference contact information and additional ROI data points. Fatima responded positively, mentioned she's building internal business case.

Brief exec meeting with Ruby to review updated business case materials. Ruby appreciates the consulting value but confirms pricing is the main hurdle. Wants to move forward but needs to see movement on price.

questions_asked.question: What's the best pricing you can offer for our team size?
questions_asked.answer: Discussed potential discount options while maintaining deal integrity

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation-focused exec meeting with Ruby. Discussed discount scenarios and contract terms. Ruby indicated that ~25-30% discount would make the decision straightforward vs Fathom. Confirmed multi-year commitment not feasible, needs annual contract.

questions_asked.question: Can you offer a discount for annual prepayment?
questions_asked.answer: Explored prepayment discount options

questions_asked.question: Would a multi-year contract enable better pricing?
questions_asked.answer: No, annual only due to budget cycles

objections: Fathom still significantly cheaper even with discount

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up exec meeting with Ruby to present revised pricing with discount. Ruby receptive to the adjusted pricing, confirmed it makes the business case defensible. Asked about implementation support and timeline.

questions_asked.question: With this pricing, what does implementation support look like?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed dedicated onboarding and quarterly coaching sessions included

next_steps: Get final approval from Michael (IT) and Amanda (RevOps)

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Fatima to walk through final proposal details with 28.7% discount. Reviewed contract terms, seat count, and billing. Fatima confirmed pricing works and she'll coordinate final reviews with Michael and Amanda.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility to add seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, can add seats anytime with prorated billing

questions_asked.question: Any concerns from your end on the revised terms?
questions_asked.answer: No concerns, just need IT and RevOps signoff

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call originally scheduled with Fatima was rescheduled due to conflict on her end. Brief discussion confirmed no blockers, just scheduling issue. Michael's security review in progress, Amanda reviewing contract language.

questions_asked.question: Any feedback from Michael or Amanda yet?
questions_asked.answer: Michael has minor security questions, Amanda reviewing MSA terms

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Ruby to finalize deal terms. Ruby confirmed all internal stakeholders are aligned. Discussed implementation kickoff timeline and success metrics. Ready to move to contracts pending final redlines from Amanda.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation after contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: Kickoff within 1 week of signature

questions_asked.question: Are there any remaining concerns from your team?
questions_asked.answer: No, everyone is aligned, just finalizing contract language

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Fatima checking on contract finalization status with Amanda. Fatima confirmed Amanda has minor redlines on data retention clauses, should be resolved within days. Deal on track to close this week.
